Table Source Code - Property Caption

Table Source Code - Field Description - Property Caption

Table Source Code Setup - Field Primary Key - Property Caption
Page Reason Codes - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a reason code to attach to the entry.
trans-unit.note: Page Reason Codes - Control Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of what the code stands for.
trans-unit.note: Page Reason Codes - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page Return Reasons - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the record.
trans-unit.note: Page Return Reasons - Control Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the return reason.
trans-unit.note: Page Return Reasons - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page Source Code Setup - Property Caption
Page Source Codes - Property Caption
Page Source Codes - Control Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of what the code stands for.
trans-unit.note: Page Source Codes - Control Description - Property ToolTip

Table No. Series - Field Date Order - Property Caption

Table No. Series Generation Detail - Property Caption

Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Increment-by No. - Property Caption
Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Is Next Year - Property Caption
Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Message - Property Caption
Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Series Code - Property Caption
Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Setup Field Name - Property Caption
Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Setup Field No. - Property Caption

Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Setup Table No. - Property Caption

Table No. Series Generation Detail - Field Warning No. - Property Caption

Table No. Series Line - Field Last No. Used - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Line No. - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Open - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Sequence Name - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Series Code - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Starting Date - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Starting No. - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Starting Sequence No. - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Temp Current Sequence No. - Property Caption
Table No. Series Line - Field Warning No. - Property Caption
Table No. Series Relationship - Property Caption
Table No. Series Relationship - Field Code - Property Caption
Table No. Series Relationship - Field Description - Property Caption
Table No. Series Relationship - Field Series Code - Property Caption
Table No. Series Relationship - Field Series Description - Property Caption
Table No. Series Tenant - Property Caption
Table No. Series Tenant - Field Code - Property Caption
Table No. Series Tenant - Field Description - Property Caption
Table No. Series Tenant - Field Last Used number - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Cannot save No. Series Line that does not exist: %1, %2
trans-unit.note: %1 = No. Series Code, %2 = Line No.
Codeunit No. Series - Batch Impl. - NamedType CannotSaveNonExistingNoSeriesErr

trans-unit.source: No. Series state cannot be saved while simulating numbers.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series - Batch Impl. - NamedType CannotSaveWhileSimulatingNumbersErr
Codeunit No. Series - Errors Impl. - NamedType OpenNoSeriesLinesTxt
Codeunit No. Series - Errors Impl. - NamedType OpenNoSeriesRelationshipsTxt
Codeunit No. Series - Errors Impl. - NamedType OpenNoSeriesTxt

trans-unit.source: It is not possible to assign numbers automatically. If you want the program to assign numbers automatically, please activate %1 in %2 %3.
trans-unit.note: %1=Default Nos. setting,%2=No. Series table caption,%3=No. Series Code
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType CannotAssignAutomaticallyErr

trans-unit.source: You may not enter numbers manually. If you want to enter numbers manually, please activate %1 in %2 %3.
trans-unit.note: %1=Manual Nos. setting,%2=No. Series table caption,%3=No. Series Code
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType CannotAssignManuallyErr

trans-unit.source: You cannot assign new numbers from the number series %1 on a date before %2.
trans-unit.note: %1=No. Series Code,%2=Date
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType CannotAssignNewBeforeDateErr

trans-unit.source: You cannot assign new numbers from the number series %1.
trans-unit.note: %1=No. Series Code
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType CannotAssignNewErr

trans-unit.source: You cannot assign new numbers from the number series %1 on %2.
trans-unit.note: %1=No. Series Code,%2=Date
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType CannotAssignNewOnDateErr

trans-unit.source: You cannot get a No. Series Line with empty No. Series Code.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType CannotGetNoSeriesLineNoWithEmptyCodeErr

trans-unit.source: You have one or more documents that must be posted before you post document no. %1 according to your company's No. Series setup.
trans-unit.note: %1=Document No.
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType PostErr

trans-unit.source: The number series %1 is not related to %2.
trans-unit.note: %1=No. Series Code,%2=No. Series Code
Codeunit No. Series - Impl. - NamedType SeriesNotRelatedErr

trans-unit.source: Number series can only use up to 18 digit numbers. %1 has %2 digits.
trans-unit.note: %1 is a string that also contains digits. %2 is a number.
Codeunit No. Series - Sequence Impl. - NamedType NoOverFlowErr

trans-unit.source: The filter on %1 was altered by an event subscriber. This is a programming error. Please contact your partner to resolve the issue.\Original %1: %2\Modified Filter: %3
trans-unit.note: %1=NoSeriesLine.FieldCaption("Series Code") %2=Original filter Value of NoSeriesLine."Series Code" %3=New filter Value of NoSeriesLine."Series Code"
Codeunit No. Series - Setup Impl. - NamedType CodeFieldChangedErr

trans-unit.source: The number format in %1 must be the same as the number format in %2.
trans-unit.note: %1=No. Series Code,%2=No. Series Code
Codeunit No. Series - Setup Impl. - NamedType NumberFormatErr

trans-unit.source: The number %1 cannot be extended to more than 20 characters.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series - Setup Impl. - NamedType NumberLengthErr

trans-unit.source: The value in the %1 field must have a number so that we can assign the next number in the series.
trans-unit.note: %1 = New Field Name
Codeunit No. Series - Setup Impl. - NamedType UnIncrementableStringErr

trans-unit.source: You cannot assign numbers greater than %1 from the number series %2. No. assigned: %3
trans-unit.note: %1=Last No.,%2=No. Series Code, %3=the new no.
Codeunit No. Series - Stateless Impl. - NamedType CannotAssignNumbersGreaterThanErr

trans-unit.source: The No. Series %1 is soon running out. The current number is %2 and the last allowed number of the sequence is %3.
trans-unit.note: %1=No. Series code,%2=Current No.,%3=Last No. of the sequence
Codeunit No. Series - Stateless Impl. - NamedType WarnNoSeriesRunningOutMsg

trans-unit.source: Number series already configured. If you wish to modify the existing series, please use the `Modify number series` prompt.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Add Intent - NamedType ExistingNoSeriesMessageLbl

trans-unit.source: Unable to load the No. Series Copilot Tool 1. Please try again later.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Add Intent - NamedType ToolLoadingErr

trans-unit.source: Searching for tables with number series related to your query
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Add Intent - NamedType ToolProgressDialogTextLbl

trans-unit.source: Please specify the tables for which you want to modify the number series.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Change Intent - NamedType SpecifyTablesErr

trans-unit.source: Unable to load the No. Series Copilot Tool 2. Please try again later.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Change Intent - NamedType ToolLoadingErr

trans-unit.source: Searching for tables with number series related to your query
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Change Intent - NamedType ToolProgressDialogTextLbl

trans-unit.source: Unable to load the No. Series Copilot Tool 4. Please try again later.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Generate - NamedType ToolLoadingErr

trans-unit.source: Unable to load the No. Series Copilot Tool 3. Please try again later.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Cop. Nxt Yr. Intent - NamedType ToolLoadingErr
Codeunit No. Series Cop. Tools Impl. - NamedType PrefixLbl

trans-unit.source: Sorry, something went wrong. Please rephrase and try again.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType ChatCompletionResponseErr

trans-unit.source: Incorrect completion. The completion is empty.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType EmptyCompletionErr
%1 = No. Series
Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType GeneratingNoSeriesForLbl

trans-unit.source: Incorrect completion. The property %1 is empty
trans-unit.note: %1 = property name
Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType IncorrectCompletionErr

trans-unit.source: Incorrect completion. The number of generated number series is incorrect. Expected %1, but got %2
trans-unit.note: %1 = Expected Number, %2 = Actual Number
Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType IncorrectCompletionNumberOfGeneratedNoSeriesErr

trans-unit.source: Sorry, I couldn't generate a good result from your input. Please rephrase and try again.\Error details: %1
trans-unit.note: %1 = Error details
Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType InvalidPromptTxt

trans-unit.source: The property %1 exceeds the maximum length of %2
trans-unit.note: %1 = property name, %2 = maximum length
Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType TextLengthIsOverMaxLimitErr

trans-unit.source: The response should be a function call.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType TheResponseShouldBeAFunctionCallErr

trans-unit.source: Unable to load the No. Series Copilot Tool. Please try again later.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit No. Series Copilot Impl. - NamedType ToolLoadingErr
Page No. Series - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Property AdditionalSearchTerms

trans-unit.source: The test failed. No number was returned for date %1.
trans-unit.note: %1 = a date
Page No. Series - NamedType CheckNoFailedTxt

trans-unit.source: The test was successful. Number %1 for date %2 was returned.
trans-unit.note: %1 = A No. Series number, %2 = a date
Page No. Series - NamedType CheckNoSucceededTxt

trans-unit.source: Specifies that a number assigned from the number series can later be deleted. This is practical for records, such as item cards and warehouse documents that, unlike financial transactions, can be deleted and cause gaps in the number sequence. This setting also means that new numbers will be generated and assigned in a faster, non-blocking way. NOTE: If an error occurs on a new record that will be assigned a number from such a number series when it is completed, the number in question will be lost, causing a gap in the sequence.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control AllowGapsCtrl - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control AllowGapsCtrl - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies to check that numbers are assigned chronologically.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control Date Order - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control Date Order - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this number series will be used to assign numbers automatically.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control Default Nos. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control Default Nos. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control Description - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last number in the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control EndNo - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control EndNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the implementation to use for getting numbers.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control Implementation - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control Implementation - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value for incrementing the numeric part of the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control IncrementByNo - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control IncrementByNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when a number was most recently assigned from the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control LastDateUsed - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control LastDateUsed - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last number that was used from the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control LastNoUsed - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control LastNoUsed - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies that you can enter numbers manually instead of using this number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control Manual Nos. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control Manual Nos. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date from which you want this number series to apply. You use this field if you want to start a new series at the beginning of a new period. You set up a number series line for each period. The program will automatically switch to the new series on the starting date.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control StartDate - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control StartDate - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the first number in the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control StartNo - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control StartNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies when you want to receive a warning that the number series is running out. You enter a number from the series. The program will provide a warning when this number is reached. You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Control WarningNo - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Control WarningNo - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Control NoSeriesLinesPart - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Control NoSeriesRelationsPart - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Action &Series - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View or edit additional information about the number series lines.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Action Lines - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Action Lines - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View or edit relationships between number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Action Relationships - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Action Relationships - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Test whether the number series can generate new numbers.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Action TestNoSeriesSingle - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Action TestNoSeriesSingle - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Action View - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Action ShowAll - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Action ShowAll - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Show number series that require your attention, such as, number series that have no lines or an have open lines which have reached the warning threshold.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series - Action ShowExpiring - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series - Action ShowExpiring - Property Caption
Page No. Series - Action View_Promoted - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - NamedType ChangeNumberLbl

trans-unit.source: Create numbers series for the new company
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - NamedType CreateNoSeriesForCompanyLbl
Page No. Series Generation - NamedType CreateNoSeriesForLbl

trans-unit.source: Create number series for [specify here] module in the format
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - NamedType CreateNoSeriesForModuleWithPatternLbl

trans-unit.source: Prepare number series for the next year
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - NamedType PrepareForNextYearLbl

trans-unit.source: Prepare number series for the [specify here] module for the next year
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - NamedType PrepareModuleForNextYearLbl
Page No. Series Generation - Control GenerationDetails - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Describe the number series you want to create or change.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Control InputText - Property InstructionalText
Page No. Series Generation - Control InputText - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - Action CreateNewNoSeriesGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Sample prompt for creating number series. Replace [purchase orders] with the entity you want to create number series for.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action NewNumberSeriesFor - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Generation - Action NewNumberSeriesFor - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Sample prompt for creating number series for a new company.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action NewNumberSeriesForCompany - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Create numbers series for the new company
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action NewNumberSeriesForCompany - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Sample prompt for creating number series for a specific module with a specific pattern. Replace [sales] with the module you want to create number series for and [@@-#####] with the pattern you want to use.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action NewNumberSeriesForModuleWithPattern - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Create numbers for the [sales] module, using pattern [@@-#####]
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action NewNumberSeriesForModuleWithPattern - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - Action ModifyExistingNoSeriesGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Sample prompt for changing the number series. Replace [sales order] with the entity you want to change the number series for and [SO-10001] with the new number.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action ChangeNumberTo - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Generation - Action ChangeNumberTo - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - Action PrepareForNextYearGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Sample prompt for setting up number series for the next year.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action PrepareForNextYear - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Prepare number series for the next year
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action PrepareForNextYear - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Sample prompt for setting up number series for a specific module for the next year. Replace [sales] with the module you want to set up number series for.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action PrepareModuleForNextYear - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Prepare number series for the [sales] module for the next year
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action PrepareModuleForNextYear - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Discards all suggestions and dismisses the dialog
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action Cancel - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Generation - Action Cancel - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - Action Generate - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Generation - Action Generate - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Accepts the current suggestion and dismisses the dialog
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation - Action Ok - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Generation - Action Ok - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation - Action Regenerate - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Generation - Action Regenerate - Property Caption
Page No. Series Generation Sub - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Description field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Ending No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Ending No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Increment-by No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Increment-by No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Message field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Message - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Series Code field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Series Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Setup Field Name field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Setup Field Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Setup Table Name field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Setup Table Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Starting Date field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Starting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Starting No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Starting No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Warning No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Generation Sub - Control Warning No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies that a number assigned from the number series can later be deleted. This is practical for records, such as item cards and warehouse documents that, unlike financial transactions, can be deleted and cause gaps in the number sequence. NOTE: If an error occurs on a new record that will be assigned a number from such a number series when it is completed, the number in question may be lost, causing a gap in the sequence.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Allow Gaps in Nos. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Allow Gaps in Nos. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last number in the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Ending No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Ending No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the implementation to use for getting numbers. Some may produce gaps in the number series. This is practical for records, such as item cards and warehouse documents that, unlike financial transactions, can be deleted and cause gaps in the number sequence.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Implementation - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Implementation - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the size of the interval by which you would like to space the numbers in the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Increment-by No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Increment-by No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when a number was most recently assigned from the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Last Date Used - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Last Date Used - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last number that was used from the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Last No. Used - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Last No. Used - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the number series line is open. It is open until the last number in the series has been used.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Open - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Open - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the number series to which this line applies.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Series Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Series Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date from which you would like this line to apply.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Starting Date - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Starting Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the first number in the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Starting No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Starting No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies when you want to receive a warning that the number series is running out.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines - Control Warning No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines - Control Warning No. - Property Caption
Page No. Series Lines Part - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies that a number assigned from the number series can later be deleted. This is practical for records, such as item cards and warehouse documents that, unlike financial transactions, can be deleted and cause gaps in the number sequence. NOTE: If an error occurs on a new record that will be assigned a number from such a number series when it is completed, the number in question may be lost, causing a gap in the sequence.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Allow Gaps in Nos. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Allow Gaps in Nos. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last number in the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Ending No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Ending No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the implementation to use for getting numbers. Some may produce gaps in the number series. This is practical for records, such as item cards and warehouse documents that, unlike financial transactions, can be deleted and cause gaps in the number sequence.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Implementation - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Implementation - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the size of the interval by which you would like to space the numbers in the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Increment-by No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Increment-by No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when a number was most recently assigned from the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Last Date Used - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Last Date Used - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last number that was used from the number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Last No. Used - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Last No. Used - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the number series line is open. It is open until the last number in the series has been used.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Open - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Open - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the number series to which this line applies.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Series Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Series Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date from which you would like this line to apply.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Starting Date - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Starting Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the first number in the series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Starting No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Starting No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies when you want to receive a warning that the number series is running out.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Warning No. - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Lines Part - Control Warning No. - Property Caption
Page No. Series Relationships - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number series code that represents the related number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships - Control Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the number series represented by the code in the Code field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships - Control Description - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for a number series that you want to include in the group of related number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships - Control Series Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships - Control Series Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the number series represented by the code in the Series Code field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships - Control Series Description - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships - Control Series Description - Property Caption
Page No. Series Relationships Part - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number series code that represents the related number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships Part - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships Part - Control Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the number series represented by the code in the Code field.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships Part - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships Part - Control Description - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for a number series that you want to include in the group of related number series.
trans-unit.note: Page No. Series Relationships Part - Control Series Code - Property ToolTip
Page No. Series Relationships Part - Control Series Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the number series represented by the code in the Series Code field.
